mission.title: argo-events: Patch option in Sensor
mission.description: Patch option in Sensor. Requested by 9+ users.

steps.title: Check current argo-events deployment
steps.description:
Verify your argo-events version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events
helm list -n argo-events 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo-events installation.

steps.title: Review argo-events configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo-events configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events
kubectl get configmap -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-events
```
Unable to submit Argo Workflow that use WorkflowTemplates. Sensor should be able to re-apply (patch) existing K8s resource. If it doesn't exist then it will create else it will patch.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Patch option in Sensor
steps.description:
you should be able to use `WorkflowTemplate` as a trigger in the sensor. 

something like,

```
        k8s:
          group: argoproj.io
          version: v1alpha1
          resource: workflowtemplates
          operation: create
```
```yaml
k8s:
          group: argoproj.io
          version: v1alpha1
          resource: workflowtemplates
          operation: create
```

steps.title: Upgrade argo-events to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade argo-events:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade argo-events argo-events/argo-events --namespace argo-events
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-events
helm list -n argo-events
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events
kubectl get events -n argo-events --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Patch option in Sensor" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Note: No discrete fix PR exists. The patch trigger capability was already available in Argo Events v0.15.0 via the k8s trigger resource. you should be able to use `WorkflowTemplate` as a trigger in the sensor. 

something like,

```
        k8s:
          group: argoproj.io
          version: v1alpha1
          resource: workflowtemplates
          operation: create
```
codeSnippets:
k8s:
          group: argoproj.io
          version: v1alpha1
          resource: workflowtemplates
          operation: create

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-events installed or the issue environment reproducible.
